[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000 1
1 0000101 2
2 1001011 4
3 0000101 2
4 0000001 1
5 1001111 5
6 0110001 3
7 0000000 a

01 10 0001011 3
12 21 0000001 1 match 4
23 32 0000001 1 match 4
34 43 1001011 4 match 2
45 54 0010001 2
56 65 0100000 1
67 76 0000000 a match 7
70 07 0000100 1

13 31 1001011 4 match 2
24 42 0000101 2 match 1 3
35 53 0000001 1 match 4
46 64 1001000 2
57 75 0010000 1 match 0

71 17 0010000 1 match 0

47 74 0010100 2
50 05 0000001 1 match 4
61 16 1101000 3
72 27 0000100 1

26 62 0000000 a match 7
37 73 0000000 a match 7
